proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_enzalutamide have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_abiraterone have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_docetaxel have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_lu177_psma have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.728 when treatment_enzalutamide=1 (n=20076) vs 3.755 when treatment_enzalutamide=0 (n=29924); Welch t p=0.153; mean diff=-0.026
Mean pfs_months: 3.740 when treatment_abiraterone=1 (n=14991) vs 3.746 when treatment_abiraterone=0 (n=35009); Welch t p=0.776; mean diff=-0.006
Mean pfs_months: 3.732 when treatment_docetaxel=1 (n=15187) vs 3.749 when treatment_docetaxel=0 (n=34813); Welch t p=0.381; mean diff=-0.017
Mean pfs_months: 3.829 when treatment_olaparib=1 (n=5098) vs 3.735 when treatment_olaparib=0 (n=44902); Welch t p=0.00329; mean diff=0.094
Mean pfs_months: 3.741 when treatment_lu177_psma=1 (n=7504) vs 3.745 when treatment_lu177_psma=0 (n=42496); Welch t p=0.872; mean diff=-0.004
Mean pfs_months: 3.805 when treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (n=2384) vs 3.741 when treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (n=47616); Welch t p=0.137; mean diff=0.064

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear association).
Patients with mcrpc=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with mcrpc=0.
Patients with visceral_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Higher psa_ng_ml (log-transformed) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher gleason_score is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS 'pfs_months ~ ecog_ps': beta[ecog_ps]=-1.1606 (SE=0.0123), p=0
Mean pfs_months: 3.509 when mcrpc=1 (n=27481) vs 4.031 when mcrpc=0 (n=22519); Welch t p=1.58e-181; mean diff=-0.521
Mean pfs_months: 3.706 when visceral_mets=1 (n=9973) vs 3.754 when visceral_mets=0 (n=40027); Welch t p=0.0345; mean diff=-0.048
Mean pfs_months: 3.743 when liver_mets=1 (n=7392) vs 3.744 when liver_mets=0 (n=42608); Welch t p=0.948; mean diff=-0.002
Mean pfs_months: 3.753 when bone_mets=1 (n=10056) vs 3.742 when bone_mets=0 (n=39944); Welch t p=0.624; mean diff=0.011
OLS 'pfs_months ~ log_psa': beta[log_psa]=-0.3817 (SE=0.0072), p=0
OLS 'pfs_months ~ gleason_score': beta[gleason_score]=-0.0062 (SE=0.0089), p=0.486
OLS 'pfs_months ~ age_years': beta[age_years]=0.1740 (SE=0.0005), p=0

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with brca2_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than those without (predicted shorter overall, but PARP-targetable).
Patients with ar_v7_positive=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without (associated with AR-targeted resistance).
Patients with msi_high=1 have different mean pfs_months than those without (overall effect uncertain; immunotherapy responders).
Patients with psma_high=1 have different mean pfs_months than those without (theranostic-eligible subset).
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with pten_loss=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 3.835 when brca2_mutation=1 (n=4996) vs 3.734 when brca2_mutation=0 (n=45004); Welch t p=0.00205; mean diff=0.100
Mean pfs_months: 3.734 when ar_v7_positive=1 (n=10038) vs 3.747 when ar_v7_positive=0 (n=39962); Welch t p=0.58; mean diff=-0.013
Mean pfs_months: 3.778 when msi_high=1 (n=1528) vs 3.743 when msi_high=0 (n=48472); Welch t p=0.515; mean diff=0.035
Mean pfs_months: 3.752 when psma_high=1 (n=29962) vs 3.732 when psma_high=0 (n=20038); Welch t p=0.273; mean diff=0.020
Mean pfs_months: 3.746 when tp53_mutation=1 (n=22422) vs 3.743 when tp53_mutation=0 (n=27578); Welch t p=0.866; mean diff=0.003
Mean pfs_months: 3.764 when pten_loss=1 (n=2536) vs 3.743 when pten_loss=0 (n=47464); Welch t p=0.621; mean diff=0.021

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months is larger in brca2_mutation=1 patients than in brca2_mutation=0 patients (positive treatment x biomarker interaction).
The benefit of treatment_enzalutamide on pfs_months is smaller (or harmful) in ar_v7_positive=1 patients than in ar_v7_positive=0 (negative interaction).
The benefit of treatment_abiraterone on pfs_months is smaller in ar_v7_positive=1 patients than in ar_v7_positive=0 patients (negative interaction).
The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is larger in msi_high=1 patients than in msi_high=0 patients (positive interaction).
The benefit of treatment_lu177_psma on pfs_months is larger in psma_high=1 patients than in psma_high=0 patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation beta=1.6188, p=4.33e-61. Effect of treatment_olaparib in brca2_mutation=1: 1.545 months; in brca2_mutation=0: -0.073 months.
Interaction treatment_enzalutamide:ar_v7_positive beta=0.0025, p=0.957. Effect of treatment_enzalutamide in ar_v7_positive=1: -0.024 months; in ar_v7_positive=0: -0.027 months.
Interaction treatment_abiraterone:ar_v7_positive beta=0.0476, p=0.334. Effect of treatment_abiraterone in ar_v7_positive=1: 0.032 months; in ar_v7_positive=0: -0.015 months.
Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high beta=-0.3401, p=0.153. Effect of treatment_pembrolizumab in msi_high=1: -0.265 months; in msi_high=0: 0.075 months.
Interaction treatment_lu177_psma:psma_high beta=-0.0174, p=0.737. Effect of treatment_lu177_psma in psma_high=1: -0.011 months; in psma_high=0: 0.006 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive linear association).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative linear association).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Greater prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Greater years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (overall ANOVA).
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (overall ANOVA).
Patients with rural_residence=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than those without.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
More education_years is associated with longer pfs_months.
Patients with insurance_type='uninsured' have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with insurance_type='private'.

analyses.result_summary: One-way ANOVA pfs_months by insurance_type; group means {'medicaid': 3.7407456171437063, 'medicare': 3.754460783639496, 'private': 3.736194439281661, 'uninsured': 3.7260960731380024}; F=0.344, p=0.794
Mean pfs_months: 3.756 when rural_residence=1 (n=9942) vs 3.741 when rural_residence=0 (n=40058); Welch t p=0.504; mean diff=0.015

OLS 'pfs_months ~ education_years': beta[education_years]=-0.0025 (SE=0.0030), p=0.402
Uninsured mean=3.726 (n=1994) vs private mean=3.736 (n=19862); diff=-0.010; Welch p=0.831

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the 25 SNP variants in the dataset, at least one is associated with pfs_months at the Bonferroni-corrected significance threshold (overall screen).
snp_rs1045642 (ABCB1) is associated with pfs_months.
snp_rs429358 (APOE) is associated with pfs_months.
snp_rs1800629 (TNF-alpha) is associated with pfs_months.

analyses.code: loop OLS pfs_months~snp_X for all 30 SNPs
analyses.result_summary: Of 25 SNPs, 1 reached p<0.05 uncorrected; 0 survived Bonferroni (p<0.002); smallest p was 0.0145 for snp_rs4986893 (beta=-0.0921).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, log_psa, albumin_g_dl, hemoglobin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, nlr, ecog_ps remains independently associated with shorter pfs_months.
In the same multivariable model, albumin_g_dl is independently associated with longer pfs_months.
The benefit of treatment_olaparib in brca2_mutation=1 patients vs brca2_mutation=0 patients (interaction effect on pfs_months) persists after adjusting for ecog_ps and mcrpc.
The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab in msi_high=1 vs msi_high=0 patients (interaction) persists after adjusting for ecog_ps and mcrpc.
The insurance_type disparity (uninsured vs private patients) in pfs_months persists after adjusting for ecog_ps, mcrpc, visceral_mets, and log_psa.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_docetaxel remains negatively associated with pfs_months (consistent with selection of sicker patients for docetaxel rather than direct harm).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + albumin_g_dl + hemoglobin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted ecog_ps beta=-1.1621 (SE=0.0118), p=0; R^2=0.220

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + albumin_g_dl + hemoglobin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted albumin_g_dl beta=0.4902 (SE=0.0160), p=1.65e-205

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation + ecog_ps + mcrpc', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted olaparib:brca2 interaction beta=1.6233, p=1.87e-73

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * msi_high + ecog_ps + mcrpc', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted pembrolizumab:msi_high interaction beta=-0.3242, p=0.135

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ uninsured + ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa', sub).fit()  # sub = uninsured/private only
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted uninsured (vs private) beta=-0.0152 (SE=0.0426), p=0.721

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + mcrpc + visceral_mets + log_psa + albumin_g_dl + hemoglobin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + treatment_enzalutamide + treatment_abiraterone + treatment_docetaxel + treatment_olaparib + treatment_lu177_psma + treatment_pembrolizumab', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted treatment_docetaxel beta=-0.0135 (SE=0.0174), p=0.436
